channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - insider-gaming.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for insider-gaming.com

item.title: 7 New Invincible VS DLC Characters Have Leaked, It’s Claimed
item.content:encoded:
Invincible VS is the new fighting game kid on the block, but the series itself is anything but. The franchise has over two decades of history, which is why seven new Invincible VS characters have supposedly leaked already.

There’s been a lot of hype for Invincible VS. Its lineage doesn’t quite stretch to the outrageous lengths that Marvel or DC do, but there’s plenty for developer Quarter Up to fall back on.

Invincible VS Getting At Least 7 New DLC Characters & New Skins Revealed

Official Invincible VS story details and character pass details were revealed before the game’s full launch.

If we cross over into the ‘unofficial’ realm of gossip and leaks, MultiverSusie—who had a long-standing reputation for leaking Multiversus and now different games—has unveiled a list of upcoming Invincible VS characters.

The unannounced names allegedly include:

  • Agent Spider
  • Angstrom
  • Damien Darkblood
  • Dinosaurus
  • Mauler Twins
  • Oliver
  • Volcanikka

It is interesting that given the two characters we know have been announced (The Immortal and Universa) are supposed to be part of Year 1, this means anywhere between two to four years of DLC characters have now been leaked already!

If the leaks are true, Quarter Up could always end up pivoting, and we’ll update you if this is the case.

The leaker has also shown a look at unreleased character skins as well.

Again, MultiverSusie has been right about leaks in the past, but keep your expectations in check for the time being.

With Mortal Kombat, Tekken, and Street Fighter comfortably on the Mount Rushmore of fighters, does Invincible VS have the potential to join them? Let us know what you think of the game through our free-to-join Insider Gaming Discord.

For more on the fighter, catch up on the game’s launch patch, which tweaks move sets and addresses crashes, and read through the complete Invincible VS Trophy List, if you haven’t already.

Written by

Evergreen Editor

Andy is Insider Gaming's Senior Evergreen Editor and has been in the games journalism sphere in one way or another for over 7 years. His video game taste is as…

More from Andrew Highton

item.title: Full Fortnite x Star Wars May 2026 Roadmap: LEGO Fortnite, Mandalorian & Grogu, & More
item.content:encoded:
May is all about Star Wars in Fortnite, with the Epic Games collab continuing with the beloved franchise, and a full month of content is arriving, as outlined in an official roadmap.

Fortnite‘s close ties with Disney are well documented, and there is a long history of Star Wars collabs in the game, and while there may not be as many major headlines as previous years, which have seen major takeovers, there’s still plenty to dig your teeth into.

If you don’t want to miss a single piece of the content that Fortnite has in May for Star Wars, Insider Gaming has all the details.

Complete Fortnite x Star Wars May 2026 Roadmap

Fortnite has a wide array of Star Wars collab content arriving throughout May, with the majority being additions to the vast world of Creative.

Several major Star Wars game modes are releasing as Creative launches, including Galactic Siege, Escape Vader, and Droid Tycoon, alongside other user-created content.

  • More Insider Gaming: How To Preload Forza Horizon 6—File Size, Explained

The other major game mode receiving collab content is LEGO Fortnite Odyssey, landing on May 14, while there are several releases planned in the Item Shop.

Check out the table below for all the Star Wars content arriving in Fortnite this month.

Is There a Fortnite x Star Wars Battle Royale Collab?

No, there is no official direct Fortnite collab with Star Wars in Battle Royale terms, unlike previous years, with the majority of content arriving outside of those modes.

Last year, a mini-season themed around Star Wars took over the Battle Royale scene, with some POIs remaining throughout the chapter, but that’s not the case this year.

  • More Insider Gaming: When Is The Next Tarkov Wipe?—Summer 2026 EFT Wipe

The limited scope of Battle Royale involvement merely extends to skins and cosmetics released in the item shop, including Clone Wars items and the Mandalorian Pen & Ink set, which can be used in Battle Royale modes.

However, don’t expect to see things like official Star Wars weapons, including Lightsabers, within the Battle Royale modes themselves.

What do you think about the Star Wars content coming to Fortnite? Share your thoughts in the Insider Gaming Discord.

For your next read, take a look at Microsoft outlining several ROG Xbox Ally Updates, and check out the free availability of Hogwarts Legacy.

MOBILE APP

item.title: Microsoft Outlines Numerous ROG Xbox Ally Updates
item.content:encoded:
Microsoft has released a new update for the ROG Xbox Ally, introducing several features aimed at improving functionality across the handheld device. The update includes changes to performance, display behaviour, and how users access their game libraries.

These additions form part of Microsoft’s ongoing updates to the platform, with adjustments targeting both handheld and docked play. Here’s a breakdown of the key changes included in the latest update.

Docking Improvements, Auto SR, Unified Games Library & More

One of the headline additions in this update is a range of improvements to docked play. When connected to an external display, the ROG Xbox Ally now offers a smoother experience, including features like automatically disabling the handheld’s screen and better support for modern display tech such as VRR.

Alongside this, Microsoft is introducing a preview of Automatic Super Resolution (Auto SR) for the ROG Xbox Ally X. This AI-powered feature boosts performance by rendering games at a lower resolution before upscaling them, helping deliver sharper visuals and improved frame rates—particularly on larger screens.

Another major addition is the introduction of a collective game library. This brings together titles from multiple PC storefronts into a single, unified interface, making it easier to browse and launch games regardless of where they were purchased.

Elsewhere, the update includes enhanced vibration for more immersive feedback, as well as new usability features like a gamepad-controlled cursor and the ability to manually add apps and games to your Xbox library.

ROG Xbox Ally April 2026 Patch Notes

New features and improvements aside, there is also a host of updates to general improvements, including performance, usability and system stability. Check out the full patch notes below:

AMD Driver

  • Resolving crashes and improving stability on titles including Crimson Desert, Ghosts of Tsushima, Avowed, Senua’s Saga: Hellblade II & Hades 2.
  • Optimizing performance on titles including Resident Evil Requiem, Horizon Zero Dawn Remastered, Marathon, Battlefield 6, Anno 117: Pax Romana.
  • General performance improvements.
  • Stability enhancements during driver updates.

Xbox app on PC and Game Bar 2604

  • Game Bar Display Widget: A new Display Widget lets you view and adjust key display settings directly from Game Bar while in Xbox mode. This makes it easier to optimize gameplay when switching between handheld mode, docking, or external displays—without leaving your game or app.
  • Manually Add or Remove Games and Apps: You can now manually add any installed game or application to your library, even if it wasn’t automatically detected. Added items can be launched from Game Bar or the Xbox App and removed at any time for easier library organization.
  • Gamepad Cursor: The new Gamepad Cursor allows you to use your controller as a virtual mouse. This makes it easier to navigate apps that don’t support native gamepad input, especially in desktop-style experiences where a keyboard or touch input isn’t available.

ASUS Armoury Crate and Command Center

New features

  • Bluetooth LE Audio support: Added support for Bluetooth LE Audio, Super Wideband Stereo feature, for improved wireless audio experiences.
  • Apps tab in Game Library: Access your installed apps more easily with a new “Apps” entry point.
  • Xbox gamepad cursor support: Navigate the system using an Xbox gamepad cursor.
  • Haptic feedback experience: Added a new “Enhanced Vibration” feature in Control Mode and Game Profiles for more immersive gameplay with richer vibration design.

Improvements

  • Fingerprint recognition accuracy: Reduced unintended touch interference during authentication for more reliable unlock.
  • CPU performance tuning: Enhanced P-Core and E-Core adjustment options in BIOS for finer control.
  • System stability: General stability improvements across system and driver layers.
  • eGPU compatibility: Improved compatibility with external GPU devices.
  • Game optimizations: Improved performance and stability for select titles, including Resident Evil Requiem and Crimson Desert.
  • Settings navigation: Optimized ACSE settings page structure for a more intuitive experience.

Bug Fixes

  • Ring LED issue: Fixed an issue where the ring LED may not work correctly after screen on/off under certain settings.
  • Manual mode SPL issue: Fixed an issue with SPL settings not applying correctly in Manual mode.
  • UI scaling issue at 900p: Fixed an issue where parts of the interface could extend beyond the screen.
  • System crash with controller emulation: Fixed a rare crash when using Xbox 360 Controller Emulator.

Windows Updates

  • AutoSR Preview: Updates to device prioritization logic in Windows 11 now allow external gamepads to be prioritized when the integrated controller is temporarily turned off.
  • Xbox Mode: The full‑screen experience is now Xbox mode, providing a more console‑like experience on ROG Xbox Ally handhelds.

Do you own an ROG Xbox Ally? If so, how do you find it? Share your thoughts in the official Insider Gaming Discord Server.

For more news, check out the new look coming for Xbox Project Helix, as well as how you can get your hands on Hogwarts Legacy for free.

Charlie is one of Insider Gaming's Guides Writers who's been in the gaming industry for a little over a year. Unfortunately for him, he enjoys every video game genre out…

More from Charlie Champion

MOBILE APP

item.title: Hogwarts Legacy Is Completely Free Right Now, Here’s How To Get It
item.content:encoded:
You knew a Harry Potter game would do well, but Hogwarts Legacy shows how much the world still loves the franchise. If you’ve somehow still never gotten a chance to wield a wand or crack open a cold butterbeer, then the Epic Games Store is giving you the chance.

Hogwarts Legacy has aptly left an incredible legacy. It has dominated the market since its 2023 release, selling 40 million copies, and carried on the success of the cultural phenomenon of witches and wizards. With Hogwarts Legacy 2 plans already underway, now’s the time to play Hogwarts Legacy for the first time, or maybe make yourself a second-year student?

How To Get Hogwarts Legacy For Free Through Epic Games Store

From May 1 to May 3, the Epic Games Store is offering everyone the chance to pick up the full game of Hogwarts Legacy completely free of charge!

It celebrates 25 years of Harry Potter (has it been that long?!), and you will need an Epic account to play it. Once you’ve made one, download and install Hogwarts Legacy on your system, and you’ll own the entirety of Hogwarts Legacy without paying a single Galleon from Gringotts Bank.

Again, this is a limited-time promotion, so you’ll need to act fast and grab it between now and over the weekend to enjoy a lifetime of muggling hijinx.

If the attractive price tag—or lack thereof—is appealing, then you might still be tempted to spend some money, as the Dark Arts Pack is currenlty 60% off.

It features:

  • Thestral Mount
  • Dark Arts Cosmetic Set
  • Dark Arts Battle Arena

Have you already played Hogwarts Legacy? Was it as good asd you hoped for? With Hogwarfts Legacy 2 on the way, you can let us know what you want to see from the game via the Insider Gaming Discord.

Check out an Onimusha: Way Of The Sword release date announcement being teased online, and Warhorse addressing what’s next for Kingdom Come: ‘We’re Already Moving Forward’ for more gaming news here at IG.

Written by

Evergreen Editor

Andy is Insider Gaming's Senior Evergreen Editor and has been in the games journalism sphere in one way or another for over 7 years. His video game taste is as…

item.title: Onimusha: Way Of The Sword Release Date Announcement Teased Online
item.content:encoded:
Capcom has teased an upcoming release date announcement for Onimusha: Way of the Sword, with a series of posts shared across the game’s official X account hinting that a full reveal could be just around the corner.

With a fresh trailer dropping back in March, all that fans are waiting for now is the release date announcement. Set in 17th-century Kyoto, the game promises intense, cinematic sword combat, and it looks like you won’t have to wait much longer to learn when you can finally get your hands on it.

Pragmata’s Diana Teases Onimusha Release Date

In a playful crossover moment, Diana—one of the central characters from Capcom’s Pragmata—appeared to “hack” the Onimusha: Way of the Sword X account. During the takeover, she shared several new in-game screenshots, highlighting the game’s eerie environments while joking about downloading a Japanese language module.

As the bit came to a close, Diana hinted at something more substantial. She revealed that she had “found something” in her files referencing a release date for Onimusha: Way of the Sword, but before she could finish downloading the necessary module to view it, her companion, Hugh, cut things short, forcing her to log off.

It proved to be a fun wrap-up to a silly takeover, but now it’s got fans on the edge of their seats, knowing that the release date announcement was so close. That being said, now that it’s been teased, it’s likely that it’ll be officially announced in the near future—maybe Diana will log back in for one final reveal?

Until then, you can scroll through the official X account and read more of Diana’s posts, or check out the Weekly Oni Memo, where more details are shared about Onimusha: Way of the Sword.

Are you excited for Onimusha: Way of the Sword? Share your thoughts in the official Insider Gaming Discord Server.

For more gaming news, check out the petition that intends to save The Last Of Us Online, as well as Subnautica 2 entering early access in May.

Charlie is one of Insider Gaming's Guides Writers who's been in the gaming industry for a little over a year. Unfortunately for him, he enjoys every video game genre out…

More from Charlie Champion

item.title: Today’s Contexto: Hints & Answer For May 1, 2026
item.content:encoded:
Contexto is a word association game that gives you a new word to guess every single day. With every attempt, the AI algorithm determines how close your guess is to the daily answer based on thematic and contextual similarity.

Sometimes, though, no matter how experienced you are, the word you’re looking for can be incredibly vague and hard to deduce. Luckily for you, this guide is full of hints to give you a helping hand, but make sure you give today’s Contexto a go if you haven’t already!

How To Play Contexto

Contexto is incredibly simple to play, but difficult to master. All you have to do is type words into the search bar, and the AI algorithm will tell you how close your word is to the answer.

You’ll know how close your guess is based on the colour of the bar and the number next to it.

  • Red includes guesses with the number 1,501 and above, meaning you’re way off from the secret word.
  • Orange includes guesses between 301 and 1,500, meaning you’re getting closer, but still some ways off.
  • Green includes guesses between 1 and 300, meaning you’re on the right track.

Best Contexto Tips & Tricks

  • Start off using broad terms, then narrow down once you’ve got under the 1,000 mark.
  • Try using Nouns first, and dip into verbs or adjectives once you’ve discovered the context.
  • Experiment with random words at times, especially as different forms of a root word can rank differently, such as work and worker.
  • Guess away, as unlike other word games like Wordle, you aren’t limited to a strict number of attempts.

Best Starting Words For Contexto

Here are some great starting words to get you going with Contexto:

  • Thing
  • Person
  • Place
  • Animal
  • Work
  • Nature
  • Game
  • Concept
  • Idea
  • Food

Contexto Hints For Today, May 1, 2026

Without giving away today’s Contexto answer, here are a few helpful hints to get you thinking in the right direction:

  • Hint 1: Magic user
  • Hint 2: A popular class in DnD
  • Hint 3: Harry Potter is one

If they don’t help, then here are the nine closest words, going from tenth to second:

  • Dragon
  • Magical
  • Mage
  • Magician
  • Warrior
  • Genius
  • Witch
  • Sorcerer
  • Magic

Today’s Contexto Answer For May 1, 2026

If you’ve tried everything and still can’t figure out today’s Contexto answer, then you can find it down below:

Answer: Wizard

A Wizard is someone who is believed to be able to use magic and cast spells.

When Is The Next Contexto Game?

Contexto is updated daily at 12 AM or Midnight in your respective time zone, meaning the next game will start on May 2.

The Contexto schedule is very consistent, with a new game releasing at the same time every day.

How did you find today’s Contexto? Share your thoughts in the official Insider Gaming Discord Server.

For more word game guides, check out the following:

  • NYT Connections
  • Wordle

Charlie is one of Insider Gaming's Guides Writers who's been in the gaming industry for a little over a year. Unfortunately for him, he enjoys every video game genre out…

item.title: Defeat And Collect Anime Codes (May 2026)
item.content:encoded:
Defeat And Collect Anime is a Roblox anime-inspired RPG experience that assigns players to embark on an adventure of collecting powerful units and battling formidable enemies. Players must strategically deploy their collected characters, defeat increasingly challenging bosses, and progress through various worlds inspired by popular anime series, and the best way to do this is to make use of some Defeat and Collect Anime Codes. This intense collection-based game transforms each session into a strategic battle where every unit combination could determine victory or defeat.

Players can enhance their experience through the game’s gacha and progression systems, including summoning rare and legendary units, upgrading their characters’ stats and abilities, and unlocking new worlds and challenges to gain tactical advantages in combat. The game features a diverse roster of anime-inspired characters, each with unique abilities and power levels that players can collect and combine for optimal team compositions.

Although units and upgrades are earned through gameplay, the fastest way to gain an edge is by redeeming promo codes that developers release.

Active Defeat And Collect Anime Codes

  • VISITS1M – 1 Spin
  • VISITS5M – 5 Spins
  • DCRELEASE0401 – 50k Cash

Expired Defeat And Collect Anime Codes

Fortunately, at the time of writing, there are no expired codes for Open Sea For Brainrots.as this game is still brand new.

How To Redeem Defeat And Collect Anime Codes

Redeeming codes in Defeat And Collect Anime is straightforward and quick—no heavy time or effort needed. Just navigate the menus, enter an active code from the list above into the text box, and you’re done. For Roblox newcomers, here’s a detailed step-by-step guide:

  1. Launch Defeat and Collect Anime on Roblox.
  2. Complete the tutorial.
  3. Click the Shop icon on the left side.
  4. Scroll to the Codes section.
  5. Paste your code into the text box.
  6. Hit Redeem to grab your reward!

Where To Get More Defeat And Collect Anime Codes

Defeat And Collect Anime codes are typically released through the game’s community and developer channels, but they don’t appear automatically in-game. The best places to catch them early are the official Discord server, where you can join discussions and see announcements before they’re widely known, and the developers’ social media accounts, where they post updates about the Roblox game.

Codes often come out around game milestones, major updates, or special events such as new world releases, character additions, or visitor count achievements. But if you’re only checking sporadically, you’ll very easily miss them because no alert system tells players when a code drops—or when it stops working.

That’s why the easiest approach is to bookmark this guide and check back periodically, rather than monitoring every source yourself. This page updates instantly when new codes drop, and we remove expired ones right away—so you only see active codes.

Enjoying our Roblox games codes coverage? Check out the codes for popular games like Steal A Brainrot, Radiant Residents, and Fix It Up on Insider Gaming!

Interested in the latest developments in the world of gaming and esports? Then join the Insider Gaming Discord server and engage with the passionate community.
